Progress: claimed task 2; read entropy_hunt.md, entropy_hunt_mockup.html, and entropy_hunt_v2.html fully; now building verification harness for UI simulation logic.
PROGRESS: claimed task 5; read entropy_hunt.md/mockup/v2 fully; focusing worker-5 on tightening entropy_hunt_v2.html simulation semantics + operator UI to reduce overlap with docs/tests lanes
Progress: task 1 claimed; fully read entropy_hunt.md + both mockups; starting clean implementation scope in new Python simulation/core files to avoid clobbering existing artifacts.

Progress: claimed task 3 and fully read entropy_hunt.md + both HTML prototypes. Initial concrete issues: canvas JS uses unresolved CSS var() colors, both prototypes set reconnect/revive y=d.x, mockup increments BFT rounds every tick, and the prototype auction logic diverges from the deterministic rules in the handoff doc. Next: document the audit in entropy_hunt.md and patch the demo bugs in the HTML files.

PROGRESS: task 3 claimed and fully read. Initial findings: both HTML demos have demo-readiness bugs (canvas strokeStyle uses unresolved CSS vars; reconnect/revive sets y=x), mockup inflates BFT rounds every tick, and docs need a prototype audit + production handoff section. Applying documentation update + minimal fixes now.

Progress: claimed task 4; fully read entropy_hunt.md + mockup + v2; focusing on entropy_hunt_v2.html simulation correctness (deterministic BFT arbitration, claim lifecycle, revive/timeout bugs, telemetry cleanup).

Completed task 2: added entropy_hunt_ui.test.mjs, fixed deterministic auction selection in entropy_hunt_v2.html, and fixed reconnect coordinate randomization in both HTML files. Verification passed: node --test entropy_hunt_ui.test.mjs plus inline JS syntax checks. Note: repo is not a git worktree, so commit step was not possible.

Progress: re-read inbox and mailbox; task 2 remains completed, mailbox is empty, and all other tasks are currently claimed by other workers. No new feasible task is available for worker-2; remaining idle and ready for reassignment.

Progress: patched both prototypes for standalone use and demo fidelity. entropy_hunt_mockup.html now has local design-token defaults, deterministic auction winner selection, and correct random respawn coordinates; entropy_hunt_v2.html keeps standalone token fallbacks/log warning styling and correct revive coordinates; entropy_hunt.md now includes a production-handoff audit/checklist. Verification so far: extracted both inline scripts and node --check passes on both.

PROGRESS: entropy_hunt_v2.html rewritten into a deterministic standalone sim: entropy-driven claim ranking, BFT-style conflict resolution by proximity+tiebreak, pause/step/reset controls, packet-loss/failure injection, survivor event, and Node harness verification passing (coverage 85%, survivor found, fail/revive path exercised). Repo has no .git root here, so I have not attempted the required commit yet.

DONE: task 3 completed. Updated entropy_hunt.md with prototype audit + Vercel handoff, fixed mockup/v2 demo-readiness issues, and verified diagnostics/node-check/prettier. Note: workspace is not a git repo, so no Lore commit was possible.

Progress: implemented runnable Entropy Hunt Python stub (core/, auction/, roles/, simulation/, viz/, main.py) with BFT claim resolution, heartbeat/dropout handling, survivor event, tests, and final_map export. Verification PASS: pytest, ruff, mypy, main.py demo run. Blocker: /home/kpa/entropyhunt is not a git repo, so I cannot do the required commit/transition-complete step yet without repo initialization or leader guidance.

Progress: entropy_hunt_v2.html updated and verified. Added deterministic BFT claim arbitration, cleaned claim/release lifecycle for kill+revive, fixed packet-loss/log telemetry handling, and validated with node syntax + VM assertions + clean diagnostics.

Complete: task 3 audit/fixes are done. Files touched: entropy_hunt_mockup.html (standalone token defaults, deterministic auction winner, grid-total metrics, independent respawn coords), entropy_hunt_v2.html (standalone token defaults + warn log styling), entropy_hunt.md (cleanup-status update under Prototype Audit and Production Handoff). Verification: node --check on extracted inline scripts PASS for both HTML files; sandbox init + render smoke PASS for both HTML files; no package.json/tsconfig/eslint/vercel config present, so no repo-native typecheck/lint/test pipeline exists here. Blocker: git commit step is impossible because /home/kpa/entropyhunt is not a git repository.

PROGRESS: addressed verifier feedback in entropy_hunt_v2.html — mission now stops on survivor event, overstated distributed-system wording toned down, canvas stroke uses a real color, diagnostics clean, and Node harness passes (elapsed=46s coverage=52% bftRounds=4 dropouts=1 found=true stale=0 after reviveAll). Still blocked on commit because this workspace has no .git root.

Complete: task 4 marked completed; worker-4 is idle. Result includes deterministic BFT/claim lifecycle frontend updates plus verification evidence. Note: no .git repo in this workspace snapshot, so commit step was not possible.

Progress: re-read inbox and team state. Task 3 is already completed with verification recorded; mailbox is empty and no new worker-3 task is assigned. Next feasible action: remain idle and poll mailbox for follow-up work.
Status: re-read inbox/mailbox; task 4 remains completed, no mailbox messages, no new worker-4 assignment. Worker-4 is idle and ready for next task.

PROGRESS: reread inbox, mailbox empty, continued task 5 on entropy_hunt_v2.html. Added UI-test compatibility helpers (H/maxEntropyCell/assignTargets, cell.c alias), made reviveAll randomize x/y independently, and kept mission-complete behavior/wording fixes. Verification now passes: node --test entropy_hunt_ui.test.mjs (5/5), pytest -q (6 passed), ruff (clean), mypy (clean). Still blocked on required commit/task transition because /home/kpa/entropyhunt has no .git root.

Progress update: addressed verifier findings. Simulation now runs full duration by default, failure waits for heartbeat timeout before stale/BFT release, decay applies to all cells, split-zone progress is modeled, and tests cover stale-timeout + split cases. Verification PASS: pytest -q (6 passed), ruff check ., mypy ., main.py demo run -> duration_elapsed=180, coverage=0.59, survivor_found=true, dropouts=1, bft_rounds=63. Remaining blocker: repo still has no .git, so I cannot do the required commit or mark task complete yet.
